channel.title: Kotlin on Arrans github.io
channel.description: Recent content in Kotlin on Arrans github.io

item.title: AndroidIDEOfficial/AndroidIDE
item.description: AndroidIDE is an IDE for Android to develop full featured Android apps.

item.title: amir1376/ab-download-manager
item.description: A Download Manager that speeds up your downloads

item.title: ligi/SurvivalManual
item.description: Libre Survival Manual for Android with offline in mind

item.title: FossifyOrg/Calendar
item.description: A simple calendar with events, customizable widgets and no ads.

item.title: spieglt/FlyingCarpet
item.description: Cross-platform AirDrop. File transfer between Android, iOS, Linux, macOS, and Windows over ad hoc WiFi. No network infrastructure required, just two devices with WiFi chips (and optionally Bluetooth) in close range.

item.title: caydey/ffshare
item.description: An android app to compress image, video and audio files through ffmpeg before sharing them

item.title: frol/completely-unscientific-benchmarks
item.description: Naive performance comparison of a few programming languages (JavaScript, Kotlin, Rust, Swift, Nim, Python, Go, Haskell, D, C++, Java, C#, Object Pascal, Ada, Lua, Ruby)

item.title: nebomuk/nobleNoteAndroid
item.description: Simple Android app to make and manage notes
